stemHtml: When comparing the braking performance of an anti-skid system on and off during a Rejected Take-Off, which statement is correct?

options.a: With anti-skid on, stopping distance is the same on dry runways but shorter on wet runways
options.b: With anti-skid on, stopping distance is longer on dry runways but shorter on wet runways
options.c: Stopping distance is shorter without anti-skid on dry runways
options.d: Anti-skid reduces stopping distance regardless of whether the runway surface is dry or wet
